title: Translation API
description: Add a translation API (e.g., Google Translate API, DeepL) to enable real-time translation of text between multiple languages.

title: Flight and Travel API
description: Integrate a travel API (e.g., Amadeus, Skyscanner, Kayak) to fetch flight information, hotel availability, travel routes, and booking details.

title: Weather API Integration
description: Integrate a weather API (e.g., OpenWeatherMap, AccuWeather) to provide real-time weather updates, forecasts, and alerts for any location.

title: Local Business Search API
description: Integrate an API like Yelp, Google Places, or Foursquare to fetch information about local businesses, including reviews, ratings, and contact details.

title: Event and Calendar API
description: Add an API (e.g., Eventbrite, Google Calendar API) to fetch event details, schedules, and reminders.

title: Currency Conversion API
description: Add a currency conversion API (e.g., ExchangeRate-API, Fixer.io) to provide real-time currency exchange rates and conversions.
